checklist_items.title: Implement strict validation of Incentive Tokens
checklist_items.description: Verify that the smart contract implements strict validation and whitelisting of Incentive Tokens to prevent malicious tokens from being offered.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The smart contract does not have sufficient validation of Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict validation and whitelisting of Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit report confirming the presence and effectiveness of Incentive Token validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Enforce multi-signature or governance checks for Incentive Token management
checklist_items.description: Ensure that critical actions related to Incentive Tokens, such as setting rates and offering tokens, require approval from a multi-signature wallet or a governance process.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There's no multi-sig or governance check for offering incentive tokens
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-signature or governance checks for critical actions such as setting incentive rates and offering tokens. Adopt Hardware Wallet for Token Manager account
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code review and configuration audit confirming multi-sig or governance enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Adopt Hardware Wallet for Token Manager account
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the Token Manager account has enabled the hardware wallet as the key vault.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Token Manager's private key can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-signature or governance checks for critical actions such as setting incentive rates and offering tokens. Adopt Hardware Wallet for Token Manager account
checklist_items.evidence_required: Record of Token Manager account's HW wallet setup.

checklist_items.title: Implement stricter validation checks on governance proposals
checklist_items.description: Verify that governance proposals are validated for correct format and adherence to protocol rules before being voted on.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There are insufficient checks to ensure governance proposals adhere to protocol rules.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement stricter validation checks on governance proposals, including format and adherence to protocol rules.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of governance smart contract code and associated validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for governance votes
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all governance votes are authenticated using cryptographic signatures to verify voter identity and prevent vote spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no strong authentication mechanism in place to verify the identity of voters.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication using cryptographic signatures to verify voter identity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit of smart contract code demonstrating cryptographic signature verification for votes.

checklist_items.title: Implement monitoring for malicious delegation patterns
checklist_items.description: Set up monitoring systems to detect unusual or malicious delegation patterns that could indicate attempts to manipulate validator boost.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There are no mechanisms to prevent or penalize malicious delegation strategies.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement monitoring and reputation systems to identify and penalize validators and delegators engaging in malicious delegation strategies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration and logs from the monitoring system showing detection rules for malicious delegation.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting for $BGT delegation transactions
checklist_items.description: Implement rate limiting on $BGT delegation transactions to prevent denial-of-service attacks through network congestion.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system doesn't have effective rate limiting or transaction prioritization mechanisms in place.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and transaction fee adjustments to prevent DoS attacks via excessive delegation transactions. Prioritize critical network operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration settings showing rate limiting parameters for $BGT delegation.

checklist_items.title: Implement strict validation of collateral assets for $HONEY minting
checklist_items.description: Verify that the HoneyFactory smart contract implements strict validation of collateral assets and their values before minting $HONEY to prevent depegging.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The deposited collateral is not validated correctly.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict validation of collateral assets and their values before minting $HONEY.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit report confirming the presence and effectiveness of collateral asset validation logic in HoneyFactory.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust error handling for invalid collateral assets
checklist_items.description: Verify that robust error handling and input validation are implemented to prevent invalid collateral assets from causing service disruptions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The deposit of an invalid collateral asset may cause the HoneyFactory smart contract to stall or become unresponsive, denying services.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust error handling and input validation to prevent malicious collateral from causing service disruptions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of HoneyFactory smart contract code confirming proper error handling and input validation for collateral assets.

checklist_items.title: Implement a robust price oracle for $BERA redemption rates
checklist_items.description: Verify that a robust price oracle or a decentralized exchange with high liquidity is in place to ensure fair $BERA redemption rates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The $BGT to $BERA exchange rate is vulnerable to manipulation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a robust price oracle or a decentralized exchange with high liquidity to ensure fair BERA redemption rates.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation and configuration of the price oracle or decentralized exchange used for $BERA redemption rates.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting or circuit breakers on $BGT to $BERA redemptions
checklist_items.description: Verify that rate limiting or circuit breakers are implemented to prevent large $BGT to $BERA redemptions from overwhelming the network.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is a lack of rate limiting or circuit breakers on $BGT to $BERA redemptions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting or circuit breakers to prevent large $BGT to $BERA redemptions from overwhelming the network.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration settings showing rate limiting or circuit breaker parameters for $BGT to $BERA redemptions.

checklist_items.title: Implement intrusion detection for validator key management
checklist_items.description: Verify the implementation of intrusion detection for unauthorized access attempts, suspicious activity, and anomalies related to validator key management.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust key management and intrusion detection for validators. Enhance Reward Vault whitelisting process.

checklist_items.title: Implement an auditable log of validator Reward Vault selections
checklist_items.description: Implement an auditable log of validator Reward Vault selections.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator Reward Vault selections are not logged or easily auditable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement an auditable log of validator Reward Vault selections.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Log of validator Reward Vault selections.

checklist_items.title: Establish a policy for regularly reviewing and updating the Reward Vault whitelisting process
checklist_items.description: Establish a formal policy outlining the procedures and frequency for reviewing and updating the Reward Vault whitelisting process to adapt to evolving threats and ecosystem changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault whitelisting process is not regularly reviewed or updated.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documented policy outlining the review and update process for Reward Vault whitelisting.

checklist_items.title: Implement obfuscation techniques for incentive strategies
checklist_items.description: Implement techniques to obfuscate incentive strategies to prevent front-running and manipulation by malicious actors.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Incentive strategies are easily predictable and exploitable.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review confirming implementation of obfuscation techniques.
